trigger_conditions.context: Frontend AgentPagesTab shows 'No pages yet' despite API returning empty array successfully

original_task.description: Display agent pages in frontend with dynamic page management

solution_approach: React component with useEffect for API calls
Conditional rendering based on data state
false_success_indicators: State updates seem to be working in isolation

hidden_dependencies.description: React requires all hooks to be called in same order on every render
hidden_dependencies.violated_by: early conditional returns in AgentPagesTab before all hooks declared

hidden_dependencies.description: Cleanup functions can interfere with state updates if component unmounts
useParams changes can trigger re-renders during component lifecycle
hidden_dependencies.violated_by: agentId changes causing hooks to be called in different order

timing_issues.description: API call completes before component fully mounted, state update lost
React Router navigation clears component state before API response processed

misleading_symptoms: Network tab shows correct data returned

fix_false_positives.attempted_fix: Added error handling to API calls
fix_false_positives.why_actually_failed: Error handling didn't address hooks order violation
Hooks still called conditionally due to early returns

fix_false_positives.attempted_fix: Added loading states and conditional rendering
fix_false_positives.why_actually_failed: Loading state logic introduced more conditional hook calls

anti_patterns_identified.description: Hooks declared after conditional returns (loading, error states)
anti_patterns_identified.impact: Causes 'Rendered more hooks than during the previous render' violations

anti_patterns_identified.description: Using window.location.href instead of React Router navigation
anti_patterns_identified.impact: Breaks React's state management and causes component unmounting

anti_patterns_identified.description: setState called after component potentially unmounted
anti_patterns_identified.impact: State updates lost or applied to unmounted components

key_principles: Always declare ALL hooks before any conditional returns
Use loading/error state to control rendering, not hook execution
Use React Router navigate() instead of window.location

hook_declaration_order: 7. Conditional returns - ONLY after all hooks

test_patterns_needed.description: Test that all hooks are called in same order on every render
Test component behavior during navigation transitions
Test API calls with various timing scenarios
test_patterns_needed.implementation: Mock API with delayed responses and component unmounting

effectiveness_calculation.formula: (User Success Rate / Claude Confidence) * TDD Factor

static_analysis: TypeScript checks for conditional hook usage
React DevTools Profiler for hooks order validation
testing_strategy: Mandatory hooks order tests for all React components
code_review_checklist: All hooks declared before conditional returns
Loading states control rendering, not hook execution

recommendation_for_future.short_term: Add React hooks testing patterns to TDD toolkit
recommendation_for_future.long_term: Build automated hooks order validation in CI/CD pipeline
